hero.subtagline: I build websites so your business gets found, trusted, and chosen.
hero.wa_message: Hi, I'd like to know more about Calo Lab's services.

services.title: Services
services.s1_desc: 1-page site to showcase your business online. Perfect for entrepreneurs and professionals.
services.s1_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Showcase Site from Calo Lab.
services.s2_desc: Up to 5 pages with custom design and tailored development.
services.s2_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Complete Site from Calo Lab.
services.s3_desc: Logo, color palette, typography, and a basic usage guide in PDF.
services.s3_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Branding package from Calo Lab.

process.title: How it works
process.p1_desc: We talk about your project, goals, and target audience.
process.p2_desc: I present the structure and budget for your approval.
process.p3_desc: Design and code with 2 revision rounds included.
process.p4_desc: Site live on Vercel with 15 days of support included.

why.title: Why Calo Lab
why.w1_desc: Design and code in one person. No information loss, no extra costs.
why.w2_desc: You work directly with me. Direct communication, fast decisions.
why.w3_desc: Fixed budget before we start. No unexpected charges at the end.
why.w4_desc: Deadlines that are met. Clear process from day one.
